response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong staff-level generalist with 20+ years of shipping software, deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise, and directly relevant hands-on work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure at his current role. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his GenAI exposure appears recent and tooling-adjacent rather than delivery-focused: the resume shows no Python, no vector database or RAG work, no evaluation/observability pipelines for AI systems, and limited evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery at enterprise scale. Worth a conversation if the AI depth is understated on paper, but he does not clearly meet the core requirements as written.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP servers and agentic-workflow frameworks, a key technology in this role
20+ years of full-stack and distributed-systems engineering, including low-latency services handling millions of requests per second
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, courses, and long-running open-source projects
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions; GenAI work appears recent and infrastructure-focused
Resume shows no Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation experience
Little demonstrated enterprise customer-facing discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience

key_factors.factor: Production GenAI depth (RAG, vector DBs, evals)
